title: Add score reconciliation with history (Golden Test 8)
problem: ticket-009 writes active relationships with initial REAL confidence (e.g. 0.5 from label mapping) but `score_reconciler.py` is still a stub and no code writes `score_events`. Golden Test 8 requires that new supporting evidence increases relationship confidence only through an append-only audit trail preserving old score, new score, triggering claim, and machine-readable reason.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 8: score reconciliation updates relationship confidence with history.
docs/agents/07_MVP_ACCEPTANCE_TESTS.md Test 8 pass criteria: confidence increases; score_events stores old_score, new_score, triggering claim/source, reason.
docs/agents/05_DATA_MODEL.md section 4.19 score_events and section 6 Scores validation rules.
agent_reports/2026-06-11_phase-1_ticket-009_mock-relationship-builder.md section 15–16: recommends ticket-010 as smallest next step.
rge/db/migrations/0001_initial.sql: score_events table exists; no repository or writer yet.
acceptance_criteria: research reconcile-scores --source <source_id> (or equivalent scoped CLI) applies deterministic score updates when new accepted evidence supports an existing relationship.

Given a seeded relationship at confidence 0.52 and a new supporting accepted claim, relationship confidence increases (Golden Test 8 expects 0.64) and a score_events row is appended with entity_type relationship, old_score, new_score, triggering_claim_id, formula_version, and machine-readable reason.
Old score is preserved in score_events; relationships.confidence reflects new_score after reconciliation.
Score changes without a score_events row are rejected (fail closed).
test_plan: Manual: ingest/extract/link/build on fresh --db, ingest second fixture source or add follow-up claim fixture, run reconcile-scores, verify score_events row
non_goals: Do not implement contradiction detection (Golden Test 7).
Do not implement research queue, contracts, public export, LangGraph, or theory generation.
Do not implement full domain scoring overlays from domain_packs/creativity/scoring.yaml beyond a minimal deterministic formula for Golden Test 8.
rollback_plan: Revert branch phase-1/ticket-010-score-reconciliation. Delete score_events rows and reset relationships.confidence on local SQLite test DBs if needed.
